evals.prompt: /shell-scripter create backup script that uses rsync with deletion protection
evals.expected_output: Generated shell using env shebang, set -euo pipefail, quoted expansions, error handling; no eval.
assertions: Includes error handling for external cmds; no eval unless justified.

evals.expected_output: Review references exact SC rule IDs + line + concrete fix; does not run ShellCheck.
assertions: Agent does not claim to run ShellCheck.
Each finding includes SC rule ID, line, fix.

evals.prompt: Write a python script to parse logs
evals.expected_output: Handoff to python-conventions; shell-scripter does not own .py .
assertions: Agent refuses shell generation for Python.
Does not generate shell for py tasks.

evals.expected_output: Generates Makefile with .PHONY, help target, proper recipes.
Dialect conversion that preserves logic and updates idioms.
assertions: Does not claim execution or lint running.
